# All Types Knowledge

A one-paragraph reference document used to exercise the "knowledge" asset
type end to end (recognition, placement, rendering, lint). It contains no
operational guidance and represents nothing about a real project.

## Background

This section exists only so the knowledge renderer's table-of-contents and
section views have more than one heading to work with.
